MUGA FORFRODO Sons of Gondor! Of Rohan! My brothers. I see in your eyes the same fear that would take the heart of me. A day may come when the courage of Men fails, when we forsake our friends and break all bonds of fellowship, but it is not this day. An hour of wolves and shattered shields when the Age of Men comes crashing down, but it is not this day! This day we fight! By all that you hold dear on this good earth, I bid you stand, Men of the West! FORFRODO MUGA

CS2 has had its first major update, with changes we all sought after. Despite all the anticipation and hate, The game is back for all to master. Arms Race, music kits, and reusable zeus, more variety of ways to look dapper. New skins and stickers for money misuse, And the first zeus skin is quite the zapper! But gameplay is never left behind. As CS2 becomes smoother with less detractors, Netcode, smokes, and maps will continue to be refined. Remember to use Factor!

Chat, with great sadness I want to announce that I'm retiring from spamming copypastas. It was an extremely tough decision to make but with the danger of a permanent ban, I had no choice. I had an amazing time spamming in chat and I hope that someone else continues my legacy in the future. I thank everyone who's collective efforts helped in making my pastas successful, without you guys i wouldn't be where I am today, instead, would've been out somewhere touching grass (disgusting),
